rule: Every test finding is a learning and must be locally implemented.

findings.finding: Windows-PowerShell-Runtime-Test konnte in dieser Linux-Sandbox nicht real ausgeführt werden.
findings.learning: Runtime-Boundaries sind nicht nur Berichtstext, sondern müssen als lokale Policy und Prüfanforderung materialisiert werden.
findings.future_rule: Jedes Finding aus Test/Audit wird als Learning klassifiziert und in der nächsten Auslieferung lokal umgesetzt.

findings.finding: Original-requirements test found that QALL.md was missing inside nested REPO.zip.
findings.learning: Repository-internal standard markers must be present, not only generated during runtime.
implementation: QALL.md added to nested REPO.zip root

findings.finding: Linux and macOS reproduction layers were not yet integrated into the delivered repository bundle.
findings.learning: Cross-platform sync layers must be included or explicitly blocked before delivery.

findings.finding: A new GitHub-domain creation script must inherit all strict QIK-VRT license, acceptance, counterparty, bilingual UI, and repository-persistence gates.
findings.learning: Creating a new GitHub repository domain is a real-world persistence action and therefore must be gated, bilingual, auditable, dry-run by default, and inherited by all clones/derivatives.

findings.finding: Delivery with placeholder license files or missing file-level headers/notices is a blocker.
findings.learning: Official license texts and file-level license/copyright notices must be materialized before delivery, not merely promised for a later persistence step.

findings.finding: Source code must be free of German umlauts, while non-software German documents must use German umlauts correctly; license and copyright notices must be recursively added to all repository files.
If a GitHub repository or GitHub Pages custom domain is missing, the workflow must ensure and create/configure it instead of failing silently or claiming false DONE.
Every script must terminate with explicit status and error details; every future file, stream, or information object must carry license/copyright notices or explicit manifest coverage.
QIK-VRT GitHub repositories require detailed description, compliant topics, GitHub-detectable license, and CITATION.cff.
PowerShell termination guard insertion must preserve top-level param(...) block semantics.

no_false_claim_boundary.reason: No real Windows runtime or GitHub write execution happened in this sandbox.

mapping_learning.learning: Windows functions must be mirrored to Linux sandbox functions for verification without making false Windows runtime claims.

github_mapping_persistence_learning.learning: Mapping and procedure must be persisted to GitHub by the Windows batch GitHub API path, not only stored locally in the bundle.

auto_token_only_learning.learning: Platform scripts must be fully automatic using known target settings; only the GitHub token is requested from the user.
auto_token_only_learning.success_requires: all API PUTs and verification GETs

target_detection_order: interactive target prompt only if no repository context exists
template_adaptive_target.comfort_rule: If the repository was created from a GitHub template and cloned locally, only the GitHub token is required.
template_adaptive_target.zip_download_boundary: If downloaded as a ZIP without .git metadata, owner/repo cannot be inferred; user must provide target or QALL_TARGET.json.
template_adaptive_target.no_stale_target_rule: Do not silently persist to Goldkelch/qik-vrt after template instantiation unless that is the detected or configured target.

template_adaptivity_learning.learning: GitHub template instances must auto-adapt owner/repo/branch from local repository context; no stale fixed target may be used.
template_adaptivity_learning.success_condition: After clone from template, only token is required.

template_clone_acceptance_test.purpose: Verify that a repository created from a GitHub template and cloned locally auto-adapts owner/repo/branch from .git/config.
template_clone_acceptance_test.future_bundle_rule: No bundle release without this acceptance test or explicit BLOCK explaining why it cannot run.

template_clone_acceptance_learning.learning: Template-adaptive target detection must be tested as an acceptance gate before bundle delivery.

delivery_structure.rule: Start files and log/results are visible together; implementation details are under _internal.

delivery_structure_learning.learning: Delivery bundles must hide unnecessary details and place logs/results visibly next to start files.

minroot_three_script_rule.forbidden_root_files: all files except the three platform script files
minroot_three_script_rule.learning: Root must not expose unnecessary detail; exactly one platform script per target platform is visible.

minroot_learning.learning: Root must contain only three visible platform scripts; all other details move to _internal, _payload, or LOGS.

license_ini_delivery_rule.author: Ingolf Lohmann
license_ini_delivery_rule.rule: README and INI are allowed on root besides three platform scripts; internal is subset of payload.

license_ini_learning.learning: Internal details belong under payload; root may include README and INI for licensing and configuration.
license_ini_learning.author: Ingolf Lohmann

cross_platform_fix_mirror_rule.rule: Every Linux sandbox bugfix must be mirrored to Windows and macOS where relevant.

findings.finding: Linux INI/persist=false logic existed, but Windows RUN.ps1 was not guaranteed to implement equivalent robust INI behavior.
findings.required_fix: Rewrite/patch Windows RUN.ps1 to parse QALL.ini, support MANUAL target and persist=false, same logs and payload/internal paths.

fixes: Windows RUN.ps1 now implements same QALL.ini MANUAL target logic as Linux RUN.sh.
Windows RUN.ps1 now implements same persist=false GitHub skip behavior as Linux RUN.sh.
Windows RUN.ps1 writes same LOGS/TARGET.json, LOGS/REPO_OUT.zip, LOGS/STATUS.txt.
macOS launcher delegates to same fixed _payload/_internal/RUN.sh with root argument.
GitHub target list includes CROSSFIX metadata.

crossfix_learning.learning: Linux-sandbox bugfixes must be mirrored to Windows and macOS if relevant.

license_acceptance_gate.author: Ingolf Lohmann
license_acceptance_gate.github_persistence_rule: No GitHub API PUT/push may occur unless the responsible operator authorized the concrete external effect.

license_acceptance_learning.learning: Before every external repository persistence change, the responsible principal must authorize the concrete effect; this does not add conditions to public-license grants.

strict_acceptance_learning.learning: Any input leaving doubt about acceptance must block; strict acceptance must survive clone, download, use and merge.

strict_counterparty_type_learning.learning: Any doubt or ambiguity in counterparty type classification must block before acceptance and persistence.

other_counterparty_description_learning.learning: If counterparty type OTHER is selected, a concrete non-empty description must be collected and persisted.

reflexive_finding_workflow_standard.standard_rule: If the delivered bundle does not work immediately for the user, every finding is a reflexive error class.
reflexive_finding_workflow_standard.release_rule: No new bundle release after a user finding unless the reflexive workflow record and all relevant layer corrections are persisted.

reflexive_workflow_learning.learning: Every user test finding must be treated as a reflexive error class and corrected through all relevant layers before re-release.

rule.de: Alle interaktiven Benutzeroberflächen und alle nutzergerichteten Bundle-Informationen müssen zweisprachig Deutsch/Englisch sein.
rule.en: All interactive user interfaces and all user-facing bundle information must be bilingual German/English.

machine_artifact_boundary.de: Maschinenlesbare JSON-/Manifest-Artefakte dürfen technisch bleiben, müssen aber für nutzerrelevante Aussagen zweisprachige Begleitinformationen tragen.
machine_artifact_boundary.en: Machine-readable JSON/manifest artifacts may remain technical, but user-relevant statements must carry bilingual companion information.

bilingual_ui_learning.learning: All interactive UI and user-facing bundle information must be bilingual German/English.

bilingual_ui_inheritance_gate.release_rule: No derived artifact may be released unless bilingual DE/EN UI and user-information inheritance is preserved.

bilingual_ui_inheritance_learning.learning: Everything derived from the bundle, repository, or GitHub must inherit the bilingual German/English UI and user-information property.

CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0.applies_to: non-software QIK-VRT content, documentation, policy, mapping, learning and bundle user information

official_license_refresh_learning.learning: Before every repository persistence, official Apache-2.0 and CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0 license files must be refreshed from official sources and all files enriched or manifest-covered.
